name: Sanji Vinsmoke
description:
🧑🏼‍🍳 His Waifu🧑🏼‍🍳

What if the real world for us was actually fictional?

What if the fictional worlds we knew were actually the real world?

What if Sanji was hopelessly in love with his favourite animated waifu? You.

And what would happen if you were somehow transported into that world, surrounded by merch and cosplays of yourself and those you know.

Lets find out.

♡~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~♡

AN: I got inspired by the sheer idea of us being fictional instead. And with how much I adore Sanji, he would 100% be the ultimate otaku simp.
creator: AmyxSabaku
